table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: Source stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. This repeatable stage records the documentation sources from which a cancer case has been notified to the registry. Each source represents a piece of documentation, such as a hospital record, pathology report, or death certificate, that supports the registration of a specific tumor. Sources are linked to a specific tumor via the Tumor Number.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
CR - Source: Tumor number
Binding: CR - Tumor number value set (required)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
CR - Source Type
Binding: CR - Placeholder: Source type value set (required)

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

description.value: Source stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. This repeatable stage records the documentation sources from which a cancer case has been notified to the registry. Each source represents a piece of documentation, such as a hospital record, pathology report, or death certificate, that supports the registration of a specific tumor. Sources are linked to a specific tumor via the Tumor Number.

comment.value: Maps the DHIS2 Cancer Registry Source stage event to a CRSourceEncounter.

name.value: Mapping: Source crSourceType to Source Type Observation

comment.value: Maps the CR - Source Type data element to a CRSourceTypeObservation.

name.value: Mapping: Source crSourceTumorNumber to Source Tumor Number Observation

comment.value: Maps the CR - Source: Tumor number data element to a CRSourceTumorNumberObservation.

definition.value: Source stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. This repeatable stage records the documentation sources from which a cancer case has been notified to the registry. Each source represents a piece of documentation, such as a hospital record, pathology report, or death certificate, that supports the registration of a specific tumor. Sources are linked to a specific tumor via the Tumor Number.

Source stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. This repeatable stage records the documentation sources from which a cancer case has been notified to the registry. Each source represents a piece of documentation, such as a hospital record, pathology report, or death certificate, that supports the registration of a specific tumor. Sources are linked to a specific tumor via the Tumor Number.
